title: Wholesale Neoprene Cosmetic Pouch, Shell Shaped Waterproof Travel Make Up Bag With Custom Embossed Logo
seoTitle: Custom White Neoprene Cosmetic Bag Manufacturer | OEM Makeup Bag Factory
description:
Designed with a clean, modern aesthetic, this custom white neoprene cosmetic bag is ideal for beauty brands, retailers, promotional companies, and wholesalers seeking a premium yet practical storage solution. Crafted from high-quality neoprene, it offers a soft touch, lightweight construction, and excellent durability for everyday use.

The spacious interior easily accommodates makeup, skincare products, toiletries, makeup brushes, travel essentials, and personal accessories. A smooth zipper closure keeps contents secure, while the structured silhouette helps the bag maintain its shape. The large front panel provides an ideal surface for custom logo printing, making it perfect for promotional campaigns and private label collections.

O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides comprehensive OEM and ODM manufacturing services, including custom materials, colors, sizes, logo applications, zipper styles, linings, and packaging to help customers create products tailored to their brand identity.
seoDescription: O'lay Technology Co., Ltd manufactures custom white neoprene cosmetic bags with OEM & ODM services. Customize logos, colors, sizes and packaging for beauty brands, wholesalers and private label projects worldwide.
